value.string: Great! Let me show you what I can assist with.

value.expression: 1. Please enter customer's name and click submit.$String:Enter$$String:Enter$
2. Looking up details for $sFirstName$ $sLastName$. Please wait...$String:Enter$$String:Enter$

value.string: Contacts
<input lightning-input_input="" type="search" id="input-148" placeholder="Search this list..." name="Contact-search-input" class="slds-input" aria-describedby="listviewSearchTooltip-138">
John Smith
Details

value.expression: 3. Please view and confirm customer details.$String:Enter$$String:Enter$

4. For credit limit increase, credit check is necessary. Please ask customer the following: "In order for me to process a credit limit increase, a credit check will be necessary. I would like to get your consent before I can proceed further."$String:Enter$$String:Enter$
5. Please wait while the credit check for $sCustomerName$ is being proccessed.$String:Enter$$String:Enter$

6. Credit check was validated. Please let the customer know the follwoing: "Congratulations, your credit check was validated and you have been approved with $$15000 credit limit.$String:Enter$$String:Enter$
7. Please click on 'Process Request' to proceed with updating the credit limit.$String:Enter$$String:Enter$

8. Please let the customer know the following: "I am now going to process your request. Please allow 24 to 48 business hours for the new credit limit to reflect on your account. An email with your request details will be sent out to you shortly for your reference".$String:Enter$$String:Enter$
9. Please ask $sCustomerName$ if further assistance is needed with anything else. If not, please proceed with processing the request by clicking 'Process Request'.

value.string: Run check and update credit limit

value.expression:
Hello $sFirstName$ $sLastName$,

Thank you for your time on the call today. I am glad that we were able to assist you with your request.
This email is to confirm that your credit limit increase request was processed successfully. Please allow 24 - 48 business hours for the change to reflect on your account.

A reference ID number has been generated. Please keep this reference ID to refer to this request: $sReferenceID$

Thank you for doing business with <customer name>.

Regards,
Moazzam Shah
RE: Credit Limit Increase Request for customer $sFirstName$ $sLastName$

Hello Moazzam,

A request was performed by an agent. Please find the call notes below.

Call Notes:
Date: $sCurrentDate$
$sCallNotes$

Reference ID to track the request: $sReferenceID$

Please do not respond to this email. This email was auto-generated by a bot.

value.string: Request submitted. This session can now be closed.
Finish the process by sending emails
